regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data, Cookie_Jar, m, url=''): from resources.lib.modules import client, control import re, requests, html from datetime import datetime from urllib.parse import urljoin if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return urls = [ 'https://roxiestreams.info/soccer', 'https://roxiestreams.su/soccer' ] page_data = '' base = '' for u in urls: try: resp = requests.get(u, timeout=3) html_text = resp.text check = html_text.lower() if any(x in check for x in ( 'cloudflare', 'just a moment', 'attention required', '/cdn-cgi/', 'cf-browser-verification' )): continue if '\s*([^<]+)\s*\s*\s*([^<]+)',page_data) out = [] for link, name, timestr in r: link = urljoin(base + '/', link) try: dt = datetime.strptime(timestr.strip(), "%B %d, %Y %I:%M %p") dt = dt + timedelta(hours=3) timestr = dt.strftime("%B %d, %Y %I:%M %p") except: pass name = html.unescape(name).strip() out.append((link, name, timestr.strip())) return out

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://fsportshdd.club/footballstreams.php') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://streambtw.com/public/api.php?action=get') return url

regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param2]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: crewschedule
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://tiplink.fans/') return url

regex.name: play
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[crewschedule.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

item.title: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR white]FULL SITE LIVE[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid] (SE)[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://istreameast.app') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://shd247.live/index.html') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Finding Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]
